---
applyTo: "**"
description: "Apply the profile links starter's core workflow, planning, and delivery rules."
---

Canonical workflow guidance lives in:

- `.ai/rules/multi-agent-execution.md`
- `.ai/rules/project-architecture.md`
- `.ai/rules/adding-new-feature.md`

For non-trivial requests:

- split the work into subtasks
- route each subtask to the best-fit specialist
- use `.aiplan/plan.md`, `.aiplan/argue/`, and `.aiplan/consensus.md`
- clean up temporary `.aiplan/` files after the task is complete

Prefer simple, accessible, performant profile-links solutions that fit Nuxt, Vue, TypeScript, ESLint, and Vanilla CSS conventions while keeping the starter config-first, single-language, and static-friendly.
